Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Mission Map ID
Fields.Description: The overlay map that contains this mission's specific MSB configuration. Represents the YY_ZZ parts in the following MSB template: mXX_YY_ZZ_AA

Fields.Name: Location Map ID
Fields.Description: The base map that the overlay map takes place on.

Fields.Name: Sub Map ID
Fields.Description: Use the map for planning placement assets with the last two digits of the placement destination MapUid offset.

Fields.Name: Time of Day
Fields.Description: The time of day at the start of the mission.

Fields.Name: Weather
Fields.Description: The weather at the start of the mission

Fields.Name: Mission Type
Fields.Description: The type of mission this is.

Fields.Name: Playthrough Appearance Type
Fields.Description: Determine whether to appear during initial playthrough or subsequent playthroughs.

Fields.Name: Mission Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID to use for the mission name, summary, objective and location name. If 0, the row ID is used.

Fields.Name: Activation Distance: X/Z
Fields.Description: The activation distance (on the x/z-axis) of mission placement items.

Fields.Name: Briefing Scene Index
Fields.Description: The garage cutscene to use for the mission briefing scene.

Fields.Name: Completion Scene Index
Fields.Description: The garage cutscene to use for the mission completion scene.

Fields.Name: Scene Conversation ID
Fields.Description: The conversation ID to use for general cutscenes. It is an offset, replacing the xxxx section in the following template: 5xxxx0000

Fields.Name: Client Name ID
Fields.Description: The name of the client (company) that is asking for the mission.

Fields.Name: Briefing Movie ID
Fields.Description: The movie ID to use for the briefing movie.

Fields.Name: COAM Reward
Fields.Description: Amount of COAM given upon successful completion of the mission.

Fields.Name: 0: Mail
Fields.Description: The mission mail parameter ID for slot 0.

Fields.Name: 1: Mail
Fields.Description: The mission mail parameter ID for slot 0.

Fields.Name: 2: Mail
Fields.Description: The mission mail parameter ID for slot 0.

Fields.Name: 3: Mail
Fields.Description: The mission mail parameter ID for slot 0.

Fields.Name: 4: Mail
Fields.Description: The mission mail parameter ID for slot 0.

Fields.Name: 0: Mission Icon
Fields.Description: The first icon displayed in the menu for this mission.

Fields.Name: 1: Mission Icon
Fields.Description: The second icon displayed in the menu for this mission.

Fields.Name: Chapter Group
Fields.Description: The chapter this mission belongs to. If the final mission of a chapter is cleared, all missions within the same chapter will be invalidated.

Fields.Name: Is Final Chapter
Fields.Description: If ON, this mission is the final mission within its chapter group.

Fields.Name: Is Achievement Mission
Fields.Description: If ON, this mission is part of the missions counted in the 'All Missions Cleared' achievement.

Fields.Name: Ammunition Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the cost of ammunition taken after mission completion.

Fields.Name: Ammunition Cost Maximum
Fields.Description: Cap to the cost of ammunition taken after mission completion.

Fields.Name: Repair Cost Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the cost of repair taken after mission completion.

Fields.Name: Repair Cost Maximum
Fields.Description: Cap to the cost of repair taken after mission completion.

Fields.Name: 0: Mission Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a mission event in this slot. Mission events appear on the reward screen after the mission, e.g. Failed to Defend X

Fields.Name: 0: Mission Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the mission event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 1: Mission Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a mission event in this slot. Mission events appear on the reward screen after the mission, e.g. Failed to Defend X

Fields.Name: 1: Mission Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the mission event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 2: Mission Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a mission event in this slot. Mission events appear on the reward screen after the mission, e.g. Failed to Defend X

Fields.Name: 2: Mission Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the mission event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 3: Mission Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a mission event in this slot. Mission events appear on the reward screen after the mission, e.g. Failed to Defend X

Fields.Name: 3: Mission Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the mission event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 4: Mission Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a mission event in this slot. Mission events appear on the reward screen after the mission, e.g. Failed to Defend X

Fields.Name: 4: Mission Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the mission event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: Loading Screen ID
Fields.Description: The image ID of the loading screen used for the mission. If 0, use the default loading screen.

Fields.Name: Loading Screen Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID for the loading screen text used for the mission. If 0, use the default loading screen.

Fields.Name: Damage Score Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the score based on damage.

Fields.Name: Ammunition Score Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the score based on ammunition consumption.

Fields.Name: Points Score Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the score based on points.

Fields.Name: Time Score Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier to the score based on time.

Fields.Name: Activation Distance: Y
Fields.Description: The activation distance (on the y-axis) of mission placement items.

Fields.Name: Time Score Maximum
Fields.Description: The time in seconds at which the time score multiplier applied in full. -1 means there is no limit.

Fields.Name: Score for S Rank
Fields.Description: If the score is less than this value, then rank S.

Fields.Name: Score for A Rank
Fields.Description: If the score is less than this value, then rank A.

Fields.Name: Score for B Rank
Fields.Description: If the score is less than this value, then rank B.

Fields.Name: Score for C Rank
Fields.Description: If the score is less than this value, then rank C.

Fields.Name: 5: Mission Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a mission event in this slot. Mission events appear on the reward screen after the mission, e.g. Failed to Defend X

Fields.Name: 5: Mission Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the mission event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 6: Mission Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a mission event in this slot. Mission events appear on the reward screen after the mission, e.g. Failed to Defend X

Fields.Name: 6: Mission Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the mission event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 7: Mission Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a mission event in this slot. Mission events appear on the reward screen after the mission, e.g. Failed to Defend X

Fields.Name: 7: Mission Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing mission event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 0: Enemy Destruction Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a enemy destruction event in this slot. Enemy Destruction events appear on the reward screen after the mission.

Fields.Name: 0: Enemy Destruction Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the enemy destruction event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 1: Enemy Destruction Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a enemy destruction event in this slot. Enemy Destruction events appear on the reward screen after the mission.

Fields.Name: 1: Enemy Destruction Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the enemy destruction event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 2: Enemy Destruction Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a enemy destruction event in this slot. Enemy Destruction events appear on the reward screen after the mission.

Fields.Name: 2: Enemy Destruction Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the enemy destruction event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 3: Enemy Destruction Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a enemy destruction event in this slot. Enemy Destruction events appear on the reward screen after the mission.

Fields.Name: 3: Enemy Destruction Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the enemy destruction event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 4: Enemy Destruction Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a enemy destruction event in this slot. Enemy Destruction events appear on the reward screen after the mission.

Fields.Name: 4: Enemy Destruction Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the enemy destruction event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 5: Enemy Destruction Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a enemy destruction event in this slot. Enemy Destruction events appear on the reward screen after the mission.

Fields.Name: 5: Enemy Destruction Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the enemy destruction event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 6: Enemy Destruction Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a enemy destruction event in this slot. Enemy Destruction events appear on the reward screen after the mission.

Fields.Name: 6: Enemy Destruction Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the enemy destruction event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: 7: Enemy Destruction Event - Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID used for a enemy destruction event in this slot. Enemy Destruction events appear on the reward screen after the mission.

Fields.Name: 7: Enemy Destruction Event - Reward
Fields.Description: Determines the amount of reward given upon completing the enemy destruction event. If negative, the reward amount is subtracted.

Fields.Name: Exclusive Group
Fields.Description: Missions within the same exclusive group will be invalidated when the mission is cleared.

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: The sorting order for this mission in the menu.

Fields.Name: Forced Loadout ID
Fields.Description: The forced loadout to apply to the player when they start this mission.

Fields.Name: Arena: Boundary Collision Entity ID
Fields.Description: The entity ID of the collision to enable during an Arena mission to form the map boundary.

Fields.Name: 0: Post-Results - Movie ID
Fields.Description: The movie ID to use after the results screen.

Fields.Name: 0: Post-Results - Playback Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag that determines movie playback. If 0, always play.

Fields.Name: 1: Post-Results - Movie ID
Fields.Description: The movie ID to use after the results screen.

Fields.Name: 0: Post-Results - Playback Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag that determines movie playback. If 0, always play.

Fields.Name: Arena: Kill Collision Entity ID
Fields.Description: The entity ID of the collision to enable during an Arena mission to form the kill boundary.

Fields.Name: Sortie: AC Name ID
Fields.Description: The text ID of the AC to display on the Sortie screen.

Fields.Name: Forced Fall Death Height
Fields.Description: The height at which death will occur dued to forced fall.

Fields.Name: Mission Selection: Map Image ID
Fields.Description: The image ID of the world map image displayed on the mission selection screen.

Fields.Name: Mission Selection: Supplementary Image ID
Fields.Description: The image ID of the supplementary image displayed on the mission selection screen.

Fields.Name: Preloaded Character ID
Fields.Description: The character ID to load at the start of the mission for its textures. Used when memory fragmentation occurs with dynamic character loading.

Fields.Name: Asset Update Limit
Fields.Description: The update limit for assets per frame.

Fields.Name: High Collision Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which high collision is activated. In metres.

Fields.Name: High Collision Activation Update Limit
Fields.Description: The update limit for activating high collision each frame. -1 defaults to 70.

Fields.Name: Activation Distance: X/Z (XB1)
Fields.Description: The activation distance (on the x/z-axis) of mission placement items.

Fields.Name: Activation Distance: Y (XB1)
Fields.Description: The activation distance (on the y-axis) of mission placement items.
